scripts.predev: node -e "const{cpSync,existsSync,mkdirSync}=require('fs');const{join}=require('path');const src=join('node_modules/cesium/Build/Cesium');const dst=join('public/cesium');if(existsSync(src)){mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});['Workers','ThirdParty','Assets','Widgets'].forEach(f=>existsSync(join(src,f))&&cpSync(join(src,f),join(dst,f),{recursive:true}));console.log('Cesium assets copied to public/cesium');}else{console.warn('cesium not found in node_modules, skipping');}"
